title: cattleya × fidelensis
intro: Cattleya × fidelensis is a hybrid orchid species, resulting from the cross-breeding of Cattleya warscewiczii and Cattleya gaskelliana. It is known to possess medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, with its roots and leaves being used in traditional medicine. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and infections. Traditionally, Cattleya × fidelensis is used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to promote relaxation and alleviate respiratory problems.
